description: Lance Wyler discusses his artistic practice at Art Basel, focusing on the integration of emergent technology and blockchain in art. He emphasizes the importance of human connection in art and the need for critical engagement with technology.
topic_summary: Lance Wyler explores the intersection of art and technology at Art Basel, discussing the role of blockchain in his work and the importance of human connection in shaping technological advancements [t=0:56-3:13].
